main_functions.description: Allows user to create an account by providing required fields and validates input according to business rules.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that email must contain '@' and a domain, and that a meaningful inline error message is displayed for invalid format.
Verify that duplicate email addresses are rejected with a meaningful inline error message.

sub_functions.description: Validates password against complexity rules including length, character requirements, and restrictions.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that password length is between 8 and 12 characters and that a meaningful inline error message is displayed for invalid length.
Verify that password contains at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one numeric digit, and one special character from allowed set (@, #, $, %, ^, &, *).
Verify that password does not contain consecutive spaces.
Verify that password does not contain the user's explicit email prefix or username.

sub_functions.description: Ensures confirm password field matches the password field.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that confirm password must match the password field, and that an error is shown if they do not match.

sub_functions.description: Validates that First name field accepts non-empty input and rejects empty input with an error message.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that First name field accepts any non-empty input and displays an error message when left empty.

sub_functions.description: Validates that Last name field accepts non-empty input and rejects empty input with an error message.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that Last name field accepts any non-empty input and displays an error message when left empty.

sub_functions.description: Validates that phone field accepts non-empty input and rejects empty input with an error message.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that phone field accepts any non-empty input and displays an error message when left empty.

main_functions.description: Handles sending verification link, link expiration, resend functionality, and first login after verification.

sub_functions.description: System sends a unique verification link via email immediately after registration.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that a unique verification link is sent via email immediately after successful registration.
Verify that each verification link is unique and cannot be reused across different accounts.

sub_functions.description: Verification link is valid for 24 hours; covers expiration and behavior when using an expired link.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that the verification link expires after 24 hours and cannot be used for login.
Verify that using an expired verification link results in an appropriate error message and does not allow login.

sub_functions.description: User can request a resend of the verification link every 60 seconds.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that user can request a resend only after 60 seconds have elapsed since the last request.

sub_functions.description: User must verify email before first login.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that user cannot log in for the first time until the verification link has been clicked.

sub_functions.description: Behavior when the verification link is clicked.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that clicking a valid verification link activates the account and allows first login.

main_functions.description: Handles scenarios related to account state after verification link expiration.

sub_functions.sub_function_name: Account State After 24 Hours Without Verification
sub_functions.description: Defines system behavior when the verification link expires without the user having verified.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that after 24 hours without verification, the account is in a state that prevents login and provides an appropriate message or option.
